---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for this project
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem would this feature solve? (e.g. "I'm always frustrated when...")

## Proposed solution
A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Which layer would this touch?
Helps scope the change — see [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](../../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md).
- [ ] Frontend (`public/`, `views/`)
- [ ] API / Controller (`src/controllers`, `src/routes`)
- [ ] Business logic (`src/services`)
- [ ] Database (`src/models`, `src/scripts/schema.sql`)
- [ ] Infrastructure / deployment

## Additional context
Anything else — mockups, related issues, links.
